Dorothy discovers that her house has landed on top of a figure; upon investigation, she realizes she has killed the Wicked Witch of the East, liberating the Munchkins from their oppression.
Dorothy stands in shock near the heavy impact site of her house.
Munchkins celebrate the liberation following the discovery of the Witch.
Dorothy investigates the area beneath the house to discover the cause of the impact.
